ksa_text: Knowledge of executive-level AI risk governance structures and processes, including board and C-suite accountability mechanisms, AI risk committee design, risk escalation protocols, and governance role definitions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the knowledge contains executive/organizational scope signals ('c.suite'), placing it above AI Provider Compliance Lead level. Composite score is minimal (0.0000). This role manages and executes compliance programs; it does not set enterprise-wide strategy or govern at C-suite authority.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 4 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions or regulatory certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Provider Compliance Lead focused on regulatory interpretation, compliance program management, and AI Act obligations.
